data.interface_name: Obtain the current setting of charging pile household according to SN
data.interface_content:
##### A brief description

- Obtain the current setting of charging pile household according to SN

##### Request URL
- `https://openapi.alphaess.com/api/getEvChargerCurrentsBySn   `
  
##### Request method
- GET

##### parameter

|parameter name|required|type|instruction|
|:----    |:----|:----- |-----   |
|sysSn   |Yes  |string | sys sn   |


##### Return parameter description 

|Fields||Type|Description|
|:----    |:----|:----- |-----   |
|code||int   |Return Code  |
|info||string   |Return Message|
|data||data |Data|
|——|currentsetting|decimal|Household current setup
